asset.title: Chat
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough clearly demonstrates the basic chat functionality within a NodeRoom, showing a user typing and sending a message in real-time. It is clean and visually consistent with the product's dark-mode aesthetic.

featureClarity.evidence: The chat input and message delivery are clearly visible, though the interaction is limited to a single message.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the start of typing through to the message appearing in the public chat, but lacks agent interaction.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode interface with clear layout, though the bottom caption overlay slightly obscures the input helper text.

consistency.evidence: Matches the NodeRoom environment with files and agents listed in the sidebar.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic screen recording of the UI, avoiding simulated animations.

legibility.evidence: Chat text and UI labels are readable, though the font size is relatively small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Demonstrates collaboration basics, which is useful but does not highlight advanced financial workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts instant local rendering of sent messages without simulating backend responses.

observedEvidence: Sidebar listing files and active users/agents

defects.observed: The orange walkthrough caption banner at the bottom partially overlaps the input field's helper text.
defects.fix: Reposition or reduce the padding of the walkthrough caption to avoid overlapping UI text.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Send instant messages to team members and agents directly within your shared workspace.
